MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Load raw customer data from CSV to staging
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_load

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Validate customer email and phone formats
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_validate

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Slowly changing dimension type 2 for customers
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_scd2

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Merge customer records from multiple sources
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_merge

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Mask PII fields for GDPR compliance
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_privacy_mask

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Flag customers at risk of churning
MAPPING.NAME: m_customer_churn_flag

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Track product price changes over time
MAPPING.NAME: m_product_price_history

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Validate journal entries debits equal credits
MAPPING.NAME: m_finance_journal_validate
